'''Pemblehov District''' was an area of [[Talos]], one of the major cities and [[Spaceport/Legends|starports]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]]. Inside Talos, it was located in the second-tier outer districts.<ref name="Shield of Lies" />
